title: Air Spotter
description: Take up your binoculars, observe the skies, and learn to recognise an Airbus from a Boeing

tips.title: Useful links
tips.details:
- [RAF aircraft](https://www.raf.mod.uk/aircraft/) - images and information about the RAF's active aircraft
- [RAF Top Trumps card game](https://rafyouthstem.org.uk/resource/raf-top-trump-card-game/) - Beat the Stats, A full set of Top Trump Cards and rules based on current and historical RAF aircraft.
- [Air-Britain aviation image library](https://abpic.co.uk/)
- [Jetphotos.com](http://www.jetphotos.com/) - an aviation photography website
- [Aviationpix.co.uk](http://aviationpix.co.uk/) - aviation photography by photographer Steve Crampton
- [Planespotter.org](http://planespotter.org/) - a database of aircraft and photos

tips.title: Contributors:
tips.details:
- Dean Hatcher (Training Officer, RAFAC)
- 20th Stourbridge (Halfpenny Green) Air Scouts
- Sqn Ldr Paul Harrap (RAF Cranwell)
- Clint Marler (UK Programme Support Team Member)
